title: Agent Registry Protocol: Vollständiger Agent Governance Stack
essence: Bluepilot Modules + Marketplace Audit + Assumption Registry + Claim Lineage bilden einen vollständigen Agent Governance Stack: Registration → Validation → Execution → Audit Trail.
steps: REGISTRATION: Agent Manifest (id, capabilities[], accepts[], delivers[], cost_tier)
VALIDATION: Audit vor Marketplace-Zugang (sol-arch-002 Scoring: Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum)
EXECUTION: Message Envelope mit type, payload, userId, timestamp
TRACKING: Claim Lineage für jeden Output (meta-002)
ASSUMPTIONS: Explicit Assumption Registry pro Reasoning Chain (meta-005)

evidence.notes: GLM5: Vollständigster Agent Governance Stack — direkt als Artifex-Fundament nutzbar
